name: 17 Asset Management
description: Privately-owned, global asset management company that designs, implements, and manages investments for a broad spectrum of clients. Specializes in blended finance and innovative financing methods to lower risk and increase returns, aligning clients' financial objectives with the United Nations SDGs. Works in both developed and emerging markets and is designing several Africa-based funds focused on climate change and healthcare.

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.
The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.
This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.
You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.
Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.
Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.

products.name: Intentional Solutions Platform
products.description: Enables swift, automated portfolio management, crafting tailored indexing solutions on-the-fly.

tavily.answer:
17 Asset Management is an asset management firm focused on sustainable investing, aligning investments with UN Sustainable Development Goals. Their official website is www.17assetmanagement.com.
17 Asset Management is an investment firm focused on sustainable and impactful investing, led by John and Heather. It aims to advance the UN's Sustainable Development Goals through ESG-compliant strategies. The firm collaborates with Intentional Asset Management and the Intentional Investment Institute.
17 Asset Management is an asset management firm focused on sustainable development goals, led by John, and uses blended finance. Crunchbase is a software development company providing predictive intelligence on private companies.
17 Asset Management focuses on sustainable investments, while Wellfound is a job board for startups, not a publicly traded company. Wellfound remains private and only accredited investors can buy its shares.
17 Asset Management is a firm focused on sustainable investments and blended finance, aiming to achieve the UN's Sustainable Development Goals. It was established in 2018 and has offices in New York, Amman, and Cape Town. The firm also operates Intentional Asset Management, a dedicated wealth and asset management division.
